about.title: About Taurus Thrift
about.subtitle: Luxury fashion, consciously curated
about.storyP1: Taurus Thrift was born from a passion for sustainable fashion and a love for timeless style. We believe that luxury should not come at the cost of the planet.
about.storyP2: Each piece in our collection is hand-selected, carefully inspected, and lovingly restored to its former glory. We curate only the finest pre-loved garments so that every purchase feels like a discovery.
about.value_sustainable_desc: Every purchase extends the life of a garment and reduces fashion waste.
about.value_curated_desc: Each piece is hand-selected to meet our quality and style standards.
about.value_quality_desc: We only accept pieces in excellent to good condition.
about.value_conscious_desc: Fashion that's good for you and good for the planet.
about.ctaSubtitle: Browse our latest collection and find your next favourite piece.
about.storyText: Taurus Thrift was born from a passion for sustainable fashion and a love for timeless style.
about.missionText: To make premium fashion accessible while reducing textile waste.
about.sustainabilityText: Every purchase extends the life of a garment and reduces fashion waste.
about.qualityText: We only accept pieces in excellent to good condition.
about.communityText: Building a community of conscious fashion lovers.
